markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce new organizational structure, project management tools, and processes to improve client service delivery and internal operations.](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Transitioning to Linear for project management, integrated with Slack for improved visibility and collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
  - [Restructuring Notion for clearer separation between client-facing and internal documentation](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [Implementing a 12-week onboarding process for new clients with standardized milestones and tasks](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)
  - [Expanding content manager (CM) layer to aim for 1:1 CM-to-client ratio, reducing reliance on freelancers](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
  - [Matthew Panzarino introduced as new Chief Content Officer, overseeing content quality and client satisfaction](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=3765.0)

## Topics

### Notion Restructuring

  - [Client database renamed from clientOS, new column added for Linear project links](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [General handbook separated into delivery and build spaces for clearer organization](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [New "How we use Notion" and "How we use Slack" guides added to handbook](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
  - [Important documents highlighted: "First 12 Weeks" and "Best Hire Mindset"](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [Personal spaces concept introduced for individual work and one-on-ones](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=1843.0)

### Slack Channel Organization

  - [Channels prefixed with 'D' for delivery team, 'B' for build team](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
  - [External channels without prefix for partnerships, 'D' prefix for active clients](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
  - [Emphasis on using channels over DMs for improved transparency and knowledge sharing](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
  - [New suffixes: '-project' for temporary projects, '-alert' for automated notifications](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)

### Linear Implementation

  - [Replacing previous task management in Notion](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=1471.0)
  - [Strong integration with Slack for notifications and updates](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Projects created for each client, following 12-week template structure](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
  - [High-level task tracking encouraged, avoiding micro-management](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)
  - [Flexibility in view options (board vs. list) and notification settings](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)

### 12-Week Client Onboarding Process

  - [Standardized timeline with specific goals and tasks for each week](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)
  - [Focus on research and understanding client in first weeks](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)
  - [Calibration and polish instructions development mid-way](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)
  - [Performance tracking and regular client updates in later weeks](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)
  - [Template available in Linear for consistent application across clients](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)

### Organizational Changes

  - [Matthew Panzarino introduced as Chief Content Officer, overseeing content quality and client satisfaction](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=3765.0)
  - [Kyle transitioning to sales and go-to-market strategy roles](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=5108.0)
  - [Directors managing multiple pods, each typically overseeing two pods](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=5573.0)
  - [Aggressive hiring planned for content managers and managing editors](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=5340.0)
  - [Goal to reach approximately 1:1 ratio of customers to team members](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=5674.0)

### Hiring and Team Expansion

  - [Focus on hiring content managers (CMs) and managing editors (MEs)](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=5340.0)
  - [Directors involved in hiring process, leveraging their networks](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=5457.0)
  - [Flexible hiring budget based on book of business and client demands](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=5607.0)
  - [Permanent open positions for CMs and MEs due to rapid growth](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=5860.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Directors and editors to book time with Daniel to review and update Linear projects for their accounts](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=4519.0)
  - [Matthew to schedule one-on-ones with managing editors in the coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=5143.0)
  - [Team to familiarize themselves with new Notion structure and Linear project management tool](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=4551.0)
  - [Hiring team to aggressively recruit for content manager and managing editor positions](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=5860.0)
  - [New roles and responsibilities document to be shared in the handbook](https://fathom.video/share/VrTMMbXtxE2ZtsXRs-_FmfM_G5SDpese?tab=summary&timestamp=5196.0)
